title: rosa coriifolia subsp. glauca
intro: Rosa coriifolia subsp. glauca, also known as the Chinese rose or white rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa coriifolia plant, a type of wild rose native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia subsp. glauca include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rosa coriifolia subsp. glauca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support women's health and promote relaxation.
